Home.title: Package Sorting Puzzle
Home.description: Players (slaves) sort packages pouring onto a conveyor belt within a limited time in this free web game.
Home.rotateToPlay: Rotate your device horizontally to play

Introduction.title: Introduction | Logistics Center Sorting Simulator
Introduction.heading: Introduction
Introduction.description:
This is a web game in which you sort packages on a conveyor belt within a time limit.
Experience the tension of working part-time at a logistics center and sorting deliveries.
Introduction.group-similar: Place the dragged item into the RT with the matching number.
Introduction.find-number: Click items with hidden numbers (???) to reveal them.
Introduction.change-full-RT: Send away full RTs and replace them with new ones.
Introduction.avoidDroppingItems: Try not to drop any items.

Game.stage_clear_2: You have become a novice slave.
Game.stage_clear_3: You have become a useful slave.
Game.stage_clear_4: You have become a full-fledged slave.
Game.stage_clear_5: You have become a slave who won't get fired!!
